# Q11 wildcard filter on EXTRACTED entity (user a*) (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q11 wildcard filter on EXTRACTED entity (user a*). `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end); `regextract()` captures one RE2 group from a text field.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter user = lowercase(arrayindex(regextract(line, "user=(\w+)"), 0)) | filter wildcard_match(user, "a*") | comp count() as events by user | sort desc events
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 1). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
